summary: Frontend-only UI testing of Orqen Workflow OS. Core flows render and most features work: Dashboard grid (3 workflows), search/filter pills, New Workflow modal + create, 3-dot menu opens (Edit/Duplicate/Delete visible), active toggle, sidebar nav across /, /runs, /approvals, /analytics, Runs list (4 rows), Run Detail pages for success/running/paused/failed all load, Analytics charts render (recharts bars + pie sectors + top workflows table), Editor at /editor/wf_support_triage shows 3-column layout with palette + react-flow canvas (6 nodes) + config panel, clicking a node opens config form, editing name field works. However, many interactive elements are MISSING the data-testid attributes the spec promised, which (a) violates the testability requirement, and (b) blocked deeper automated verification of several flows. UI itself looks visually correct in the screenshots.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='dashboard-search' on the 'Search workflows...' input

Dropdown opens and shows Edit/Duplicate/Delete, but menu items lack data-testid='workflow-edit-<id>' / 'workflow-duplicate-<id>' / 'workflow-delete-<id>'. Duplicate click could not be auto-targeted; also overlay intercepts pointer events when fallback selectors are used.
Missing data-testid='run-view-<runId>' on the View button/link per spec. Rows have run-row-<id> but the View action itself is unselectable by spec id.
The text 'Live' renders for run_live01 but the element lacks data-testid='live-badge'
Missing data-testid='approval-approve-btn' and 'approval-reject-btn' on the in-page side panel buttons for run_paused1

Stack trace text ('evaluateOperand') not visible on initial load of /runs/run_failed1 — likely behind an Error tab that is not selected by default; please verify default tab or auto-select error tab when run.status==='failed'.

Cards do not expose data-testid='approval-card-<id>' nor 'approval-approve-<id>' / 'approval-reject-<id>'. Could not auto-verify Approve/Reject flow; page renders visually but counts returned 0 for testid query.
Missing data-testid='stat-card-<key>' on the 4 KPI cards (totalRuns, successRate, totalTokens, totalCost). Charts and table render correctly.

Save and Run buttons in editor header appear visually but data-testid='editor-save-btn' / 'editor-run-btn' / 'config-delete-btn' could not be queried — likely missing. Could not auto-verify save toast, mock streaming run, and delete-node behaviours.

integration_issues.issue: Could not auto-verify navigation because the test got stuck on the missing dropdown item testid before reaching the Run button click; visually the Run button is present on each card.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes per the spec to: Dashboard search input (dashboard-search); workflow card menu items (workflow-edit-<id>, workflow-duplicate-<id>, workflow-delete-<id>); Runs page row View link (run-view-<runId>); RunDetail Live badge (live-badge); RunDetail paused approve/reject buttons (approval-approve-btn, approval-reject-btn); Approvals page cards and buttons (approval-card-<id>, approval-approve-<id>, approval-reject-<id>, approvals-tab-pending, approvals-tab-resolved); Analytics stat cards (stat-card-totalRuns etc.); Editor toolbar (editor-save-btn, editor-run-btn, config-delete-btn).
Ensure /runs/run_failed1 shows the error/stack-trace tab by default (or auto-select it when status==='failed') so users immediately see the failure cause.

Verify dropdown menu items are not blocked by an invisible overlay — automated clicks against the visible 'Duplicate' text consistently failed with 'html intercepts pointer events'. This is likely a Radix portal z-index/pointer-events issue.

Re-run end-to-end automated tests once testids are added to validate: card duplicate, delete confirm modal, run-from-card navigation, editor save toast, editor mock streaming (cyan→green), editor node delete, approvals Approve/Reject + tab switching.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid coverage is inconsistent across pages despite being explicitly requested in the prompt. Some elements have them (workflow-card-<id>, workflow-menu-<id>, workflow-toggle-<id>, new-workflow-btn, new-wf-name, filter-all/active/inactive, nav-*, run-row-<id>, config-node-name, node-palette, config-panel) but several interactive elements that the spec calls out are missing them. This should be standardised.
Dropdown overlay intercepts pointer events for automated tooling — consider Radix DropdownMenu Portal + correct z-index, or add testids that map directly to items.
/runs/run_failed1 should default to the Error/Stack tab when status==='failed' so the trace is visible without an extra click.

success_rate.frontend: ~65% (core rendering & navigation OK; many flows un-verifiable due to missing testids)

seed_data_creation: Created one transient workflow 'TEST_WF_New' via the New Workflow modal during the run. It is held only in React state and is gone on reload — no cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent adds the missing data-testid attributes listed in action_items, re-run a full Playwright sweep: (1) Dashboard duplicate + delete-with-confirm + run-navigation; (2) Editor save toast + mock streaming run (expect node statuses to advance cyan→green and final 'Success' badge after ~6-9s) + node delete; (3) Approvals approve+reject and Pending/Resolved tab switching; (4) RunDetail /runs/run_failed1 stack-trace visibility; (5) /runs/run_live01 watch nodes advance every ~1.5s via setInterval+advanceRun. All pages were reachable; no JS page errors were captured in this run.
